title: HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES

sections.section: HARMONIZED GUIDELINES FOR INTERNAL QUALITY CONTROL IN ANALYTICAL CHEMISTRY LABORATORIES
sections.summary: CAC/GL 65-1997 adopts by reference the 'Harmonized Guidelines for Internal Quality Control in Analytical Chemistry Laboratories' for quality assurance of food control laboratories and cites the Pure & Appl. Chem. (1995) publication.
